title: fumaria capreolata var. flabellata
intro: Fumaria capreolata var. flabellata, commonly known as the Rock Fumitory, is a rare and variable variety of the Fumaria capreolata plant, characterized by its distinctive, fan-shaped leaves and white to pinkish flowers. Traditionally, Fumaria capreolata var. flabellata has been used in herbal medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, including its potential to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and support the immune system. Fumaria capreolata var. flabellata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
